name: jewelry-authority-fleet
description: Multi-platform commerce intelligence dashboard unifying eBay, Shopify, business website, and Salesforce.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix mcp-server
